event: Portrait of Saint Elizabeth of Thuringia
symbols: crown — Elizabeth's royal status as a princess and landgravine
palm branch with red ribbon — the martyr's palm, symbolizing triumph through suffering and charity
book — devotion to Scripture and the life of prayer
open hand gesture — generosity and charity toward the poor
description: A three-quarter length portrait of a young woman wearing a small crown atop her dark hair. She is dressed in a richly embroidered red and gold bodice over a pink skirt, with a deep green velvet cloak draped over her shoulders. In one hand she holds a palm branch tied with a red ribbon, and under her other arm she carries a small book. Her right hand extends outward in an open gesture. A jeweled brooch adorns her neckline. The background is dark and neutral, focusing attention on the elegantly dressed figure.
